question.text: An analyst employed by a research entity shall NOT be subject to supervision or control of:

answer.text: Any employee of the merchant banking, investment banking, or brokerage services divisions
The CEO of the research entity

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 17(4): Research analysts shall not be supervised by IB/MB/brokerage division employees. This prevents commercial pressure on research. **The Trap:** Supervision by the research head, compliance, or CEO is appropriate. Only IB/MB/brokerage supervision is prohibited. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 14 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Reporting lines must ensure research independence. Analysts should report to research management, not to revenue-generating divisions.
